summary: Phase 2 detailed execution plan — AI Pipeline + Rendering. Lists every file for the pipeline (detector, analyzer, catalog, splitter, orchestrator), scheduler (event-driven matcher, dispatcher), assembler (render FFmpeg stitching), contributor daemon (agent, heartbeat, executor, storage bridge, WebSocket client, monitor), and Docker images. Each file has its exact purpose, key functions/classes, inputs/outputs, and design decisions documented.
